hero.title: Swiss Young Professional Visa
hero.subtitle: Pre-Screening Form
hero.description: Find out if you qualify for the Swiss Young Professional Visa program. Complete our short pre-screening form to check your eligibility.
hero.disclaimer: This is a pre-screening only. Passing does not guarantee visa approval.

about.title: About the Webinar
about.description: Our webinar provides in-depth guidance on the Swiss Young Professional Visa application process, requirements, and practical steps to maximise your chances of success.

form.title: Pre-Screening Form
form.subtitle: Complete all sections to check your eligibility
form.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

rejection.title: Unfortunately, You Don't Qualify at This Time
rejection.subtitle: Thank you for your interest in the Swiss Young Professional Visa program.
rejection.country_not_eligible: We're sorry — your passport country ({country}) is not currently eligible for the Swiss Young Professional Visa program. The program is only open to nationals of specific partner countries.
rejection.age_out_of_range: We're sorry — the Swiss Young Professional Visa has an age requirement of {min}–{max} years for {country} passport holders. Based on your date of birth, you are currently {age} years old.
rejection.vocational_training_required: We're sorry — the Swiss Young Professional Visa requires applicants to have completed vocational training or a university degree. This is a mandatory requirement of the Swiss authorities.
rejection.field_interest_required: We're sorry — the program requires participants to have a genuine interest in working in their field of study or training in Switzerland.
rejection.encouragement: Immigration programs evolve. If your circumstances change, we encourage you to re-apply in the future.
rejection.contact: If you believe this assessment is incorrect, please contact us.

success.title: Congratulations — You're Eligible!
success.subtitle: Please review your payment instructions below to secure your place.
success.eligible_message: You have passed our initial eligibility check for the Swiss Young Professional Visa webinar.
success.payment_intro: To secure your place, please transfer the webinar fee to the following Wise account:
success.next_steps: Once your payment is verified by our team, you will receive the Zoom link to join the webinar. Please allow 1–2 business days for payment verification.
success.contact: For questions, reply to the confirmation email or contact us at {email}.
success.check_email: A confirmation email with these details has been sent to {email}.

footer.screening_note: Pre-screening results are indicative only and do not constitute visa approval.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.submission_failed: Your submission could not be processed. Please try again.
errors.network: A network error occurred. Please check your connection and try again.
